name_en: Three colors, two sizes available🌟🌟🌟🌟 Large H real photos🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 26C latest woven flap bag, handmade woven bag, woven shopping bag 🥂 The raffia and rattan weaving elements that are indispensable in vacation vibes, using imported natural wheat straw grass. Just didn't expect so many bright suede material handbags to appear in the summer vacation series... Matching for a wonderful summer night dinner or party, jewelry embellishments are a must on the handbag, the collector's series ice cream cup is the favorite~ Dimensions: 26cm, 23cm
